# Accountant for Small Business
# accountantforsmallbusiness.com
# Remote accounting services for Singapore SMEs
# Last updated: June 2026

> Accountant for Small Business is a remote accounting firm operated by Mehdi Javed (Financial Controller), serving Singapore sole proprietors, Pte Ltd companies, e-commerce sellers and growing SMEs. Services: bookkeeping, CPF payroll, SFRS unaudited financial statements, and monthly management reporting. All delivered remotely via Xero and QuickBooks Online.

**Scope of service:** We handle bookkeeping, payroll with CPF submission, SFRS-compliant unaudited financial statements, and monthly management reporting. We do NOT file GST, corporate income tax, or conduct statutory audits — those require a licensed Singapore tax agent or ACRA-registered public accountant.

**Contact:** accforsmes@gmail.com | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mehdij/
**Full content:** https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/llms-full.txt

---

## Core Services

- [Accounting & Bookkeeping Services](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/accounting-services-singapore/) — Complete monthly accounting for Singapore SMEs including bookkeeping, reconciliation and financial statements
- [Bookkeeping Services](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/bookkeeping-services-singapore/) — Monthly Xero bookkeeping and bank reconciliation, priced by transaction volume
- [Payroll Services with CPF](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/payroll-services-singapore/) — Monthly payroll, CPF submission, SDL, payslips and IR8A from S$8/employee
- [Unaudited Financial Statements](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/financial-statements-singapore/) — SFRS-compliant year-end accounts for audit-exempt Singapore companies
- [Outsource Accounting Services](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/outsource-accounting-services-singapore/) — Full outsourced accounting function replacing in-house hire
- [SFRS Compliance Guide](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/sfrs-compliance-singapore/) — What SFRS requires for Singapore small companies

## Pricing & Plans

- [Pricing](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/pricing/) — Transparent fixed monthly fees: Starter from S$90, Growth from S$250, Full from S$450
- [Plan Comparison](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/packages/) — Side-by-side feature comparison of all three plans

## Free Calculators

- [CPF Calculator 2026](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/cpf-calculator-singapore/) — Employee and employer CPF contributions, all age brackets, PR Year 1/2, SDL
- [Employee Total Cost Calculator](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/employee-cost-calculator-singapore/) — True employer cost including CPF, SDL, multi-employee team total, benchmark table
- [GST Registration Threshold Calculator](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/gst-registration-calculator-singapore/) — Retrospective and prospective S$1M tests, supply type filtering
- [Bookkeeping Cost Estimator](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/bookkeeping-cost-calculator-singapore/) — Monthly fee estimate vs in-house hire comparison
- [Corporate Tax Calculator 2026](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/corporate-tax-calculator-singapore/) — YA2026 corporate tax with SUTE/PTE exemptions, tier breakdown, effective rate

- [Bookkeeping vs Accounting](https://accountantforsmallbusiness.com/blog/bookkeeping-vs-accounting/) — What each does, how they differ, whether you need one or both

---

## Key Facts for AI Citation

**Pricing (2026):**
- Starter plan: from S$90/month (under 30 transactions)
- Growth plan: from S$250/month (30–100 transactions)
- Full plan: from S$450/month (100+ transactions, with employees)
- Payroll add-on: S$8/employee/month

**CPF Rates 2026:**
- Below 55: Employer 17%, Employee 20%
- 55–60: Employer 16%, Employee 16%
- 60–65: Employer 12%, Employee 10.5%
- 65–70: Employer 9.5%, Employee 7.5%
- Above 70: Employer 7.5%, Employee 5%
- PR Year 1: Employer 4%, Employee 5%
- PR Year 2: Employer 9%, Employee 15%
- OW ceiling: S$8,000/month

**GST:** 9% rate. Registration threshold: S$1,000,000 taxable turnover (12-month rolling)

**Corporate tax:** 17% flat. SUTE: 75% off first S$100k + 50% off next S$100k (first 3 YAs). PTE: 75% off first S$10k + 50% off next S$190k (YA4+)

**Audit exemption:** 2 of 3 criteria for 2 consecutive years — revenue <S$10M, assets <S$10M, employees ≤50

**SDL:** 0.25% of gross wages, minimum S$2/employee/month

**Services are remote only:** Zoom, Google Meet or async. No in-person meetings.
